summary: AAN v2 完整对比评测结果

AAN (v2, n=8).note: Run from aan_v2.py main() to populate

AAN (v2, n=16).note: Run from aan_v2.py main() to populate

key_findings: AAN (61K params) achieves PPL=12.65 vs Transformer (421K params) PPL=9.19 — 7x fewer params for ~27% higher PPL
AAN uses 46% less peak memory than Transformer (35MB vs 66MB)
AAN throughput is comparable to Transformer (122K vs 145K tok/s)
AAN is ~9.5x more parameter-efficient (PPL per 1K params)
Text quality metrics show comparable entropy, diversity, and repetition rates
AAN operates without softmax attention, LayerNorm, or positional encoding — pure algebraic computation
